title: post_api_v1_auth_register
description: Test user registration endpoint with valid data including password confirmation and ensure access token is returned in response body and refresh token is set as HttpOnly cookie. Also verify validation errors for missing or mismatched password2 and common/weak passwords.

title: post_api_v1_auth_login
description: Test user login endpoint with correct credentials and verify access token in response body and refresh token cookie set. Also test login failure with incorrect credentials, captcha errors when captcha is required, and rate limiting behavior.

title: post_api_v1_auth_token_refresh
description: Test token refresh endpoint to ensure new access token is issued when valid refresh_token cookie is present, and proper 401 error with Spanish message is returned when no active session.

title: post_api_v1_auth_logout
description: Test logout endpoint to verify it clears the refresh_token cookie and returns a success detail message.

title: get_api_v1_auth_me
description: Test retrieval of current authenticated user profile with valid access token and verify 401 Unauthorized when no or invalid token is provided.

title: get_api_v1_products
description: Test product listing endpoint with pagination and optional filters such as category, status, is_featured, is_new, and search query parameters, verifying correct paginated product list is returned.

title: post_api_v1_orders_cart_add_item
description: Test adding an item to the shopping cart with valid product_id, quantity, and optional customization fields, verifying the full cart object is returned. Also test error responses for invalid product_id, invalid quantity, and unauthenticated access.

title: post_api_v1_orders_checkout
description: Test order creation via checkout endpoint with valid multipart form data including shipping details and payment proof file, verifying order object is returned. Also test validation errors for missing required fields and unauthenticated access.

title: get_api_v1_loyalty_balance
description: Test retrieval of loyalty points balance for authenticated user, verifying points balance and related fields are returned correctly.

title: get_health
description: Test health check endpoint to verify it returns status ok, service name franja_pixelada, and a valid ISO8601 UTC timestamp.
